heading: Acquisition of land; options
label: 2268a Acquisition of land; options
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 428a of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The Department of Agriculture is authorized to acquire land, or interest therein, by purchase, exchange or otherwise, as may be necessary to carry out its authorized work: , That no acquisition shall be made under this authority unless provision is made therefor in the applicable appropriation or other law.Provided

children.label: b
children.text: Appropriations for the Department of Agriculture which are available for the purchase of land may be expended for options to purchase land: , That not to exceed $1 may be expended for each option to purchase any particular tract or tracts of land unless otherwise provided in appropriation or other law.Provided
